SEARCH
Package memory.model

Interface GameModelListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameController
public interface GameModelListener
Observer interface for game-state changes in GameModel.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Stefan Malesevic

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onCardFlipped()
    Called after a card has been flipped.
    void
    onCardsHidden()
    Called after mismatched cards have been flipped back.
    void
    onGameOver()
    Called when all pairs have been found.
    void
    onPairMatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
    Called when two revealed cards form a matching pair.
    void
    onPairMismatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
    Called when two revealed cards do not match.

  • Method Details

    • onCardFlipped

      void onCardFlipped()
      Called after a card has been flipped.

    • onPairMatched

      void onPairMatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
      Called when two revealed cards form a matching pair.
      Parameters:
      row1 - row of the first card
      col1 - column of the first card
      row2 - row of the second card
      col2 - column of the second card

    • onPairMismatched

      void onPairMismatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
      Called when two revealed cards do not match. The listener must subsequently call GameModel.hideCards().
      Parameters:
      row1 - row of the first card
      col1 - column of the first card
      row2 - row of the second card
      col2 - column of the second card

    • onCardsHidden

      void onCardsHidden()
      Called after mismatched cards have been flipped back.

    • onGameOver

      void onGameOver()
      Called when all pairs have been found.
